area.value: one animal one animal /level, no two of which can be more than 30 ft. apart

description.value: By bringing forth the primeval ancestry of the target animal, you awaken a savage engine of destruction. The animal immediately gains the advanced creature simple template. It gains a +2 bonus on all rolls, including damage rolls and special ability DCs, a +4 bonus to AC and CMD, and +2 hit points per HD. The animal’s primal instincts take hold for the duration of this spellâif the animal knows tricks granted by the Handle Animal skill, it loses access to all of those tricks save for âattack.â This spell has no effect on animals that already have the advanced creature template. Atavism, Mass This spell functions as atavism, except it affects multiple creatures. Section 15: Copyright Notice Pathfinder Roleplaying Game: Ultimate Magic.
